title: Submission: 1.0941 BPB by David Weyh
body:
## Description
Achieved 1.0941 BPB using Document-Level LoRA TTT on a 10L, 512-dim model compressed to 15.0 MB via INT8+Zlib. Verified on 8xH100. Over 100 validation documents processed sequentially with 2 TTT Epochs and LR=0.01 per document to achieve massive causal adaptation.
